final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: commercial interior photography for medical aesthetic clinic brochure
Primary request: symmetrical wide shot of a modern minimalist skin treatment room in a high-end medical aesthetic clinic
Scene/backdrop: spacious treatment room with frosted glass sliding door revealing soft hallway light, professional medical environment
Subject: ergonomic electric treatment bed at center, LED phototherapy device and RF beauty equipment at headboard, large electronic skin analyzer display on wall, floor-to-ceiling skincare display cabinet with premium medical-grade products (hyaluronic acid serums, collagen masks, anti-aging ampoules), shadowless surgical light and smart dimming system on ceiling
Style/medium: commercial interior photography, photorealistic architectural visualization
Composition/framing: symmetrical layout emphasizing professional order, wide establishing shot, centered perspective
Lighting/mood: soft natural medical-grade clean lighting with smooth shadow transitions, adjustable color temperature and brightness
Color palette: minimalist white + natural wood tones + subtle green accents from plants, moderate saturation
Materials/textures: genuine leather bed surface texture, cool metallic sheen on instruments, warm tactile wood elements, frosted glass translucency
Constraints: maintain symmetrical composition, emphasize "technology meets nature" design philosophy, professional and clean atmosphere
Avoid: cluttered composition, harsh shadows, oversaturated colors, plastic-looking materials, watermark, text overlay
